'''Legendary''' is a North American team that was founded when [[Dadslammers]] disbanded.

== History ==
Legendary qualified for the [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Summer Qualifier|2015 NACS Summer Qualifier]] with a 4th-place [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Summer Qualifier/Ladder|ladder]] seed. However, they did not turn their paperwork in on time and so were disqualified from the tournament.
